Transparent Pricing
The Villain

The Problem Every Retailer Faces

You're paying for processing AND paying separately for marketing that might not even work.

Paying for Marketing Separately

You're already paying 2.5-3% for processing, then spending thousands more on websites, SEO, and ads that may or may not deliver results.

Losing to Online Competitors

Big box stores and Amazon have massive marketing budgets. Local retailers can't compete on marketing spend, so customers never find you.

Juggling Multiple Vendors

Payment processor, web designer, SEO company, ad agency — managing multiple vendors is expensive, time-consuming, and often ineffective.

The Solution

Three Pillars of Growth

Everything you need to accept payments and grow your business, working together seamlessly.

Competitive Processing

Industry-leading rates that match or beat your current processor. Same-day deposits. No hidden fees. No long-term contracts.

  • All major cards — Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover
  • Contactless & mobile — Apple Pay, Google Pay, Samsung Pay
  • Same-day deposits — Get your money when you need it
  • PCI DSS compliant — Bank-level security always
  • Transparent pricing — No hidden fees, ever
  • Fraud protection — Advanced chargeback prevention
2.4% Avg Rate

FREE Marketing Services

Website design, SEO, social media, Google Ads, email marketing — ALL INCLUDED. We fund your entire marketing operation from processing margins.

  • Custom website design — Unique to your brand
  • Local SEO optimization — Rank for "[service] near me"
  • Google Ads management — Professional campaigns
  • Social media marketing — Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn
  • Email marketing — Automated campaigns & newsletters
  • Review management — Get more 5-star reviews
$3,000+ Value

True Partnership

We only win when you win. Our success is directly tied to your growth. That's why we invest in marketing that drives real results.

  • Month-to-month agreements — No long-term lock-ins
  • Transparent reporting — See exactly what we're doing
  • Dedicated support — Direct access to your team
  • Growth-focused — We succeed when you succeed
  • Local expertise — Understanding your market
  • Continuous optimization — Always improving results
True Partnership
The Process

How It Works

Get started in four simple steps. We handle everything — you focus on running your business.

1

Free Analysis

Send us your current processing statements. We'll show you exactly how much you can save and what marketing we'll provide.

2

Easy Switch

Seamless transition to our payment platform. We handle all the technical setup. Usually takes less than a week.

3

Marketing Begins

We immediately start building your website, optimizing your Google presence, and launching your marketing campaigns.

4

You Grow

More customers discover you. More sales come in. More transactions process. The flywheel spins — everyone wins.

Complete Suite

Complete Marketing Suite — All Included

Every service you need to dominate your local market and grow your business online.

Custom Website — Built For You

A stunning, conversion-optimized website that makes customers want to buy. Mobile-first design that looks incredible on every device.

  • Custom design — Unique to your brand, not a template
  • Mobile-optimized — Perfect on phones, tablets, desktops
  • Lightning fast — Sub-2-second load times
  • SEO-ready — Built to rank on Google
  • Online booking — Let customers schedule appointments
  • E-commerce ready — Sell products online
$3,000+ Value
Professional website design & development
$1,500/mo Value
Local SEO & Google Business optimization

Dominate Local Search Results

Get found when customers search for businesses like yours. We handle the technical SEO so you show up at the top of Google.

  • Google Business Profile — Fully optimized & managed
  • Local SEO — Rank for "[service] near me" searches
  • Citation building — Listed on 50+ directories
  • Review management — Get more 5-star reviews
  • Keyword optimization — Target high-intent searches
  • Monthly reporting — Track your ranking progress

Targeted Ads That Convert

Professional Google Ads campaigns that put your business in front of ready-to-buy customers. We manage everything — you get the customers.

  • Campaign setup — Search, display, and local ads
  • Keyword research — Target profitable search terms
  • Ad copywriting — Compelling ads that get clicks
  • Landing pages — Optimized for conversions
  • Ongoing optimization — Continuous improvement
  • ROI tracking — Know exactly what's working
$1,000/mo Value
Professional Google Ads management
$800/mo Value
Social media management & content

Build Your Online Presence

Professional social media management that builds your brand and engages your community. We create, post, and manage — you focus on running your business.

  • Profile setup — Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn
  • Content creation — Graphics, photos, videos
  • Posting schedule — Consistent, strategic posting
  • Community management — Respond to comments & messages
  • Paid social ads — Targeted Facebook & Instagram ads
  • Analytics & reporting — Track growth & engagement

Your Success Is Our Success

We only win when you win. That's why every marketing dollar works harder for your business.

The Comparison

Plato's Wallet vs. Traditional Processors

See why smart businesses are making the switch to payment processing that actually grows their business.

Traditional Processor Plato's Wallet
Processing Rate 2.5% - 3.5% 2.4% Average
Custom Website ✗ Not Included ✓ FREE ($3,000 value)
SEO Services ✗ Not Included ✓ FREE ($1,500/mo value)
Google Ads Management ✗ Not Included ✓ FREE ($1,000/mo value)
Social Media Marketing ✗ Not Included ✓ FREE ($800/mo value)
Same-Day Deposits ✗ Extra Fee ✓ Included
Total Monthly Value $0 extra $5,000+ in FREE marketing
Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about Plato's Wallet payment processing and marketing services.

We fund your marketing from the processing margin. Instead of keeping all the profit from your card transactions, we invest a portion back into growing your business through professional marketing services. You don't pay anything extra — it's built into the normal processing relationship.
Our average effective rate is 2.4% — competitive with or better than most processors. We provide a free analysis of your current statements to show you exactly how we compare. Many businesses actually save money while getting thousands in free marketing.
Everything: custom website design, local SEO, Google Business Profile optimization, Google Ads management, social media setup and content, email marketing, review management, and monthly performance reporting. Worth $2,000-$5,000/month if you hired an agency.
No. We operate month-to-month. We believe our service should earn your business every month. If you're not happy, you can switch anytime. (But you won't want to — our partners stay for years.)
Payment processing is usually active within 3-5 business days. Your website typically launches within 2-3 weeks. SEO and ads start immediately after your site goes live. You'll see marketing activity within your first month.
We work with retail businesses, restaurants, service providers, salons, auto shops, professional services, and more. If you process credit card payments and want to grow, we can probably help. Request an analysis to find out.
Take Action

Join 30+ retail partners who are getting $5,000+/month in free marketing just by processing payments with us. No risk. No commitment to start.
